name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
📖 How to use VocabSRS:

1. Create a deck to organize your words
2. Add cards with a word, translation, and optional example
3. Tap Start Reviews to study — rate each card to schedule your next review

The bot remembers your progress and shows cards right before you forget them.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
